```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "pyproject.toml",
  "3:LEN": "[build-system]\r\nrequires = [\"setuptools>=61\", \"wheel\"]\r\nbuild-backend = \"setuptools.build_meta\"\r\n\r\n[project]\r\nname = \"netprof\"\r\nversion = \"0.1.0\"\r\ndescription = \"Offline network traffic collector and behavior profiler\"\r\nreadme = \"README.md\"\r\nrequires-python = \">=3.12\"\r\nlicense = { text = \"MIT\" }\r\nauthors = [{ name = \"Netprof\" }]\r\ndependencies = [\r\n    \"dpkt>=1.9.8\",\r\n    \"scapy>=2.5.0\",\r\n    \"h2>=4.1.0\",\r\n    \"hpack>=4.0.0\",\r\n    \"hyperframe>=6.0\",\r\n    \"pydantic>=2.0\",\r\n    \"pydantic-settings>=2.0\",\r\n    \"pyyaml>=6.0\",\r\n    \"typer>=0.9.0\",\r\n    \"pytest>=7.0\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n[project.optional-dependencies]\r\ndev = [\r\n    \"pytest>=7.0\",\r\n    \"ruff>=0.1.0\",\r\n    \"mypy>=1.0\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n[project.scripts]\r\nnetprof = \"netprof.cli.main:app\"\r\n\r\n[tool.setuptools.packages.find]\r\nwhere = [\".\"]\r\ninclude = [\"netprof*\"]\r\n\r\n[tool.ruff]\r\ntarget-version = \"py312\"\r\nline-length = 100\r\nsrc = [\"netprof\", \"tests\"]\r\n\r\n[tool.ruff.lint]\r\nselect = [\"E\", \"F\", \"I\", \"N\", \"W\", \"UP\"]\r\nignore = [\"E501\", \"N806\"]\r\n\r\n[tool.mypy]\r\npython_version = \"3.12\"\r\nwarn_return_any = true\r\nwarn_unused_configs = true\r\nignore_missing_imports = true\r\n\r\n[tool.pytest.ini_options]\r\ntestpaths = [\"tests\"]\r\npythonpath = [\".\"]\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 3
}
```
